title: Ben Roberts (footballer)
extract: Ben James Roberts (born 22 June 1975) is an English former professional footballer who played as a goalkeeper. Since being forced into early retirement in 2005 at the age of 29 through injury, he has become a goalkeeping coach. currently as goalkeeper coach for Chelsea under interim head coach Calum McFarlane and starting July 1st 2026, Xabi Alonso.
